subcodes.title: Words spoken at Ritz Hotel in Budapest, 1913-04-13
subcodes.first_line: If the speaker's intention be pure, if his heart be transparent, no matter through how many translators the words may go, the audience will be touched.
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @stories; anecdotes, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc.
